Runtime · SDUI
The server controls the app
JSON-based SDUI lets you update screens from the server instantly — no app release required. Minimal resources, high-speed parsing.
{
  "type": "DropDown",
  "id": "dropExChange",
  "value": "KRX",
  "width": 100
